base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_7_pipe_land — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. World 7 — Pipe Maze/Pipe Land. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World 7 — Pipe Maze/Pipe Land; heavily pipe-based navigation
